summary: Tested bi-directional governance integration (Minutes↔Money). All backend APIs pass (14/14). Found and fixed 1 frontend bug in AttachMinutesDialog. All core features verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - SelectItem with empty string value causing runtime error 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'

seed_data_creation: Created test distributions, compensation payments, and benevolence records through API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bi-directional governance integration is fully working. Backend tests cover: minutes search, save-with-records (Minutes→Money), attach-minutes for distributions/compensation/benevolence (Money→Minutes). Frontend verified: Guided Minutes Step 3 toggles for creating linked records, Distributions/Compensation/Benevolence pages show minutes column/dropdown, AttachMinutesDialog opens and searches correctly.

guided_minutes_step3.details: Shows 'Create Tracking Records' section with toggles for Compensation, Distribution, Benevolence records. Form fields include Amount, Recipient, Date, Purpose. Save creates linked records shown in Step 4 success screen.

distributions_minutes_column.details: Minutes column visible in table. 'Linked' status shown for linked distributions. Dropdown menu with 'Link to existing minutes' and 'Document in minutes (retroactive)' options.

compensation_minutes_actions.details: Payments show 'Linked to minutes' indicator. Unlinked payments have dropdown with link/document options.

benevolence_minutes_actions.details: Records show DOCUMENTED status. Benevolence API attach-minutes endpoint tested and working.

attach_minutes_dialog.details: Dialog opens correctly (after bug fix). Search input, type filter (All types, Annual, Quarterly, Compensation, Distribution), minutes list, and Link Minutes button all functional.

backend_search_endpoint.details: GET /api/guided-minutes/search returns minutes list. Supports trust_id, query, minutes_type, and limit parameters.

backend_save_with_records.details: POST /api/guided-minutes/save-with-records creates minutes and linked distribution/compensation/benevolence records.

backend_attach_minutes.details: PATCH endpoints for distributions, compensation, and benevolence all working to attach minutes_record_id.

bug_fixed.issue: SelectItem had value='' which is invalid in Radix UI Select component
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use value='all' and transform on change handler
